use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, modals, and call-to-action sections across any web application
Destructive action buttons for delete, remove, or cancel confirmations
Secondary or outline-styled buttons for less prominent actions alongside primary buttons
Ghost-style navigation buttons in toolbars and inline contexts
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements like toolbar actions
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 5 sizes (default, sm, lg, xl, icon), with built-in loading state and icon support. Uses Tailwind CSS with focus-visible ring states for accessibility.
